entries.title: Rethinking rate-related myocardial injury in sepsis: atrial fibrillation, heart rate, cardiac troponin T and long-term mortality.
entries.title_ko: 패혈증에서 심박수 관련 심근 손상 재고: 심방세동(AF), 심박수, cardiac troponin T 및 장기 사망률
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 혈압상승제(vasopressor)가 필요한 중증 성인 패혈증 환자에서 atrial fibrillation(AF), 최고 심박수, 상승된 hs-cTnT가 1년 사망률과 독립적·복합적으로 연관되는지, 그리고 패혈증 관련 troponin 상승을 심박수 관련 수요성 허혈(demand ischaemia)로 설명할 수 있는지에 대한 질문.

pico.population: [Sweden] Secondary analysis of the retrospective Sepsis and Elevated Troponin (SET) cohort: 586 adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support admitted to intermediate/intensive care units at Danderyd University Hospital, Stockholm, between March 2012 and September 2021, fulfilling Sepsis-3 criteria with hs-cTnT measured within 48 hours of sepsis onset; 177 (30%) had pre-existing AF and 112 (19%) developed new-onset AF.
pico.intervention: Atrial fibrillation status (no AF, pre-existing AF defined by prior ICD-10 diagnosis, or new-onset AF confirmed by ECG/telemetry within 72 hours) and highest recorded heart rate during the first 72 hours (analysed continuously and dichotomised at 120 beats per minute), in relation to hs-cTnT (elevated ≥15 ng/L; quartiles Q1 15–41, Q2 42–78, Q3 79–184, Q4 >184 ng/L).
pico.comparison: Patients with no AF (and heart rate ≤120 beats per minute as the reference stratum in stratified Cox analyses).
pico.outcome: All-cause 1-year mortality. Compared with no AF, pre-existing AF (HR 2.4; 95% CI 1.8 to 3.2; p<0.001) and new-onset AF (HR 1.8; 95% CI 1.3 to 2.5; p<0.001) were associated with higher mortality. Highest recorded heart rate was not associated with mortality as a continuous variable (HR 1.0; 95% CI 0.99 to 1.004; p=0.580), by cubic splines (p=0.303), or dichotomised at 120 beats per minute. After multivariable adjustment, AF and hs-cTnT remained independently associated with 1-year mortality whereas highest recorded heart rate did not.

pico_ko.population: [스웨덴] 후향적 Sepsis and Elevated Troponin(SET) 코호트의 2차 분석: 2012년 3월~2021년 9월 스톡홀름 Danderyd University Hospital의 중간/중환자 치료실에 입원하여 vasopressor 지원이 필요했던 성인 패혈증 환자 586명으로, Sepsis-3 기준을 충족하고 패혈증 발생 48시간 이내 hs-cTnT가 측정됨; 177명(30%)이 기존 AF, 112명(19%)이 new-onset AF를 보임.
pico_ko.intervention: Atrial fibrillation 상태(AF 없음, 기존 ICD-10 진단으로 정의된 pre-existing AF, 또는 72시간 이내 ECG/telemetry로 확인된 new-onset AF)와 첫 72시간 내 최고 심박수(연속변수 및 120 beats per minute 기준 이분화)를, hs-cTnT(상승 ≥15 ng/L; 사분위 Q1 15–41, Q2 42–78, Q3 79–184, Q4 >184 ng/L)와 관련하여 분석.
pico_ko.comparison: AF가 없는 환자(계층화 Cox 분석에서는 심박수 ≤120 beats per minute 이면서 AF 없는 군을 기준군으로 사용).
pico_ko.outcome: 전체 원인 1년 사망률. AF 없음 대비 pre-existing AF(HR 2.4; 95% CI 1.8~3.2; p<0.001)와 new-onset AF(HR 1.8; 95% CI 1.3~2.5; p<0.001)에서 사망률이 더 높았음. 최고 심박수는 연속변수(HR 1.0; 95% CI 0.99~1.004; p=0.580), cubic spline(p=0.303), 120 beats per minute 이분화 어느 방식으로도 사망률과 연관되지 않음. 다변량 보정 후 AF와 hs-cTnT는 1년 사망률과 독립적으로 연관되었으나 최고 심박수는 그렇지 않았음.

keyFindings: Among 586 vasopressor-dependent sepsis patients, 30% had pre-existing AF and 19% new-onset AF; both were independently associated with higher 1-year mortality (pre-existing AF HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2; NOAF HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5; both p<0.001).

Highest recorded heart rate was not associated with mortality (continuous HR 1.0, 95% CI 0.99–1.004, p=0.580; splines p=0.303) and explained essentially none of hs-cTnT variability (R < 0.001); AF explained only 1.2% of hs-cTnT variability.

Elevated hs-cTnT (≥15 ng/L) was present in 546/586 (93%); 1-year mortality rose progressively across hs-cTnT quartiles with an additive increase when AF was concomitant, and both AF and hs-cTnT remained independent predictors after multivariable adjustment while heart rate did not.
keyFindings_ko: vasopressor 의존 패혈증 환자 586명 중 30%가 pre-existing AF, 19%가 new-onset AF였으며, 두 유형 모두 1년 사망률과 독립적으로 연관됨(pre-existing AF HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2; NOAF HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5; 모두 p<0.001).
최고 심박수는 사망률과 연관되지 않았고(연속 HR 1.0, 95% CI 0.99–1.004, p=0.580; spline p=0.303) hs-cTnT 변동을 사실상 전혀 설명하지 못했으며(R < 0.001), AF도 hs-cTnT 변동의 1.2%만 설명함.
상승된 hs-cTnT(≥15 ng/L)가 546/586명(93%)에서 존재했고, 1년 사망률은 hs-cTnT 사분위에 걸쳐 점진적으로 증가하며 AF 동반 시 additive하게 증가했으며, 다변량 보정 후 AF와 hs-cTnT는 독립적 예측인자로 남았으나 심박수는 그렇지 않았음.
entries.fullText:
### Introduction
Atrial fibrillation (AF), elevated heart rate and elevated plasma cardiac troponin are common manifestations of sepsis-related circulatory stress, yet their clinical significance remains unclear. In practice, troponin elevations during sepsis are often attributed to rate-related demand ischaemia associated with higher heart rates or AF, and structured cardiac follow-up after discharge is not routinely performed. However, no guidelines specifically address management of sepsis-associated myocardial injury, leaving uncertainty for critical care physicians and cardiologists regarding short-term and long-term care.
AF and elevated heart rate are recognised markers of illness severity, but whether they directly contribute to myocardial injury or simply co-occur with troponin elevation remains uncertain. Furthermore, the extent to which plasma high-sensitivity cardiac troponin T (hs-cTnT), AF and heart rate independently or jointly relate to long-term mortality is unknown. To address this gap, we investigated the associations of hs-cTnT, AF and highest recorded heart rate, with 1-year mortality in a cohort of critically ill patients with sepsis.

### Methods

### Study population and trial design
The Sepsis and Elevated Troponin (SET) study was a previously reported single-centre retrospective cohort study evaluating the association between plasma hs-cTnT concentrations and mortality in patients with sepsis or septic shock. Details of patient inclusion are provided in the supplemental material (). The cohort comprised 586 adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support in the intermediate or intensive care units at Danderyd University Hospital, Stockholm, Sweden, between March 2012 and September 2021. The study was approved by the Swedish Ethical Review Authority.
Patients were identified retrospectively through the electronic health record (EHR). Eligible participants required vasopressor support, fulfilled Sepsis-3 criteria for sepsis or septic shock and had at least one hs-cTnT measurement within 48 hours of sepsis onset. According to Sepsis-3, septic shock was defined as requiring vasopressor therapy to maintain a mean arterial pressure ≥65 mm Hg and serum lactate >2 mmol/L despite adequate fluid resuscitation.

### Data collection and outcomes
Baseline demographic and clinical characteristics, laboratory and microbiological data, in-hospital treatments and mortality were extracted from the EHR. Frailty was assessed using the Clinical Frailty Scale, comorbidity burden using the Charlson Comorbidity Index and disease severity using the Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (SOFA) score. Sepsis onset was defined as the time at which sepsis-related abnormal vital signs were first documented in the EHR.
Electrocardiograms obtained within 8 hours of sepsis onset were classified as normal if sinus rhythm was present with QRS duration ≤0.12 s and no ST-segment or T-wave abnormalities. Patients were classified as having no AF, pre-existing AF (defined by a previously registered International Classification of Diseases [ICD]-10 diagnosis code for AF in the EHR) or new-onset AF (NOAF). AF, whether previously diagnosed or new-onset, was confirmed by ECG or continuous telemetry monitoring within 72 hours of sepsis onset.
Plasma hs-cTnT was analysed at the Karolinska University Laboratory (Stockholm, Sweden) using an electrochemiluminescence assay (Elecsys Assay 2, Roche Diagnostics). Myocardial injury was defined as hs-cTnT above the 99th percentile upper reference limit (≥15 ng/L). Because AF and heart rate evolve dynamically during sepsis, the highest available hs-cTnT value within 48 hours of sepsis onset was used to reflect cumulative myocardial injury. hs-cTnT concentrations were categorised into quartiles: Q1, 15–41 ng/L; Q2, 42–78 ng/L; Q3, 79–184 ng/L; Q4, >184 ng/L.
The highest recorded heart rate within the first 72 hours of sepsis onset was extracted from the EHR using values documented by nursing staff from continuous telemetry monitoring. Heart rate was analysed as a continuous variable in regression models and dichotomised at 120 beats per minute for Kaplan-Meier analyses. This prespecified threshold was based on physiological data demonstrating rising hs-cTnT concentrations above 110–120 beats per minute in patients with AF, aligned with guideline-recommended rate-control targets (<100–110 beats per min), and was consistent with a previous study in septic and cardiogenic shock that used the same cut-off.
The primary analysis examined the association between the highest plasma hs-cTnT and all-cause 1-year mortality in patients with and without AF, adjusting for the highest recorded heart rate. Secondary analyses assessed the contributions of AF and heart rate to variability in hs-cTnT.

### Statistical analysis
Baseline characteristics were summarised according to AF category (no AF, pre-existing AF or NOAF). Continuous variables were reported as mean (SD) for normally distributed data and median (IQR) for non-normally distributed data. Categorical variables were presented as counts and percentages. Between-group comparisons were performed using one-way analysis of variance for normally distributed continuous variables and the Kruskal-Wallis test for non-normally distributed continuous variables. Categorical variables were compared using the χ² test.
Time-to-event for 1-year all-cause mortality was estimated using Kaplan-Meier methods, with group comparisons performed using the log-rank test. For stratified Kaplan-Meier analyses, pre-existing AF and NOAF were combined into a single binary AF variable to facilitate visual presentation.
Univariable and multivariable linear regression analyses were used to assess continuous associations, and natural cubic splines were used to evaluate non-linear relationships. Multivariable Cox proportional hazards regression evaluated associations with 1-year mortality. A multivariable regression model was constructed to evaluate the associations between AF, heart rate and myocardial injury. Covariates were selected a priori based on clinical relevance and established associations with sepsis mortality. Right-skewed predictors, including hs-cTnT, were natural log-transformed before regression analyses.
Missing data for covariates were negligible. An exception was left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), available in 305 patients (52%) who underwent transthoracic echocardiography during hospitalisation. To retain all patients in multivariable analyses, an ordinal variable was created to capture both echocardiography availability and systolic dysfunction: 0, not performed; 1, preserved LVEF (≥50%); 2, mildly reduced LVEF (40–49%); 3, moderately or severely reduced LVEF (<40%).
All tests were two-sided, with p value <0.05 considered statistically significant. Analyses were conducted using IBM SPSS Statistics, V.30.0.0.0 (IBM Corp) and RStudio, V.2024.04.2+764.

### Results

### Baseline characteristics and hospital course
The SET study included 586 patients with sepsis or septic shock requiring vasopressor treatment ().
Patients with AF were older, more frequently male and had greater frailty and cardiovascular comorbidity than those without AF (). Pre-existing AF was associated with a higher burden of chronic cardiovascular disease and lower habitual renal function.
Patients with NOAF demonstrated higher SOFA scores and greater inflammatory burden during sepsis, reflected by higher C reactive protein concentrations. Patients with AF also had higher recorded heart rates, hs-cTnT concentrations and N-terminal pro–B-type natriuretic peptide concentrations. Elevated hs-cTnT concentrations were observed in 546 patients (93%), with values ranging from 4 ng/L to 21 900 ng/L. The range of highest recorded heart rates was 60–174 beats per minute in the no AF group, 44–190 beats per minute in the pre-existing AF group and 62–190 beats per minute in the NOAF group.

### Contribution of AF, heart rate and left ventricular function to variation in hs-cTnT levels
AF status was associated with log-transformed hs-cTnT concentrations, but the effect size was small, explaining only 1.2% of the variability in hs-cTnT levels (). Likewise, AF status explained only 2.2% of the variability in highest recorded heart rate (). Heart rate itself was not associated with log-transformed hs-cTnT concentrations and accounted for virtually none of the observed variability (R < 0.001; ). Among patients with echocardiographic data, lower LVEF was associated with higher log-transformed hs-cTnT concentrations and explained 9.4% of the variability in hs-cTnT levels ().
[Figure: Figure 1 — ]

### 1-year mortality by AF, heart rate and troponin
At 1 year, the highest recorded heart rate was not associated with mortality, whether analysed as a continuous variable (HR 1.0; 95% CI 0.99 to 1.004; p=0.580), modelled using natural cubic splines (p=0.303) or dichotomised at 120 beats per minute (). Compared with patients without AF, both pre-existing AF (HR 2.4; 95% CI 1.8 to 3.2; p<0.001) and NOAF (HR 1.8; 95% CI 1.3 to 2.5; p<0.001) were associated with higher 1-year mortality ().
In stratified analyses of AF and heart rate, Kaplan-Meier curves demonstrated marked differences in unadjusted mortality between groups (). Patients with a heart rate ≤120 beats per minute and no AF had the lowest mortality, followed by those with a heart rate >120 beats per minute and no AF. Mortality was higher in those with a heart rate >120 beats per minute and AF, and highest in those with a heart rate ≤120 beats per minute and AF.
These findings were consistent with univariable Cox regression, using patients with heart rate ≤120 beats per minute and no AF as the reference group (with the lowest mortality). entries.title: Likelihood of Bacterial Infection in Immunocompromised Patients Treated With IV Antibiotics for Possible Sepsis.
entries.title_ko: 패혈증 의심으로 IV 항생제를 투여받은 면역저하 환자에서 세균 감염의 가능성
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 응급실에서 패혈증 의심으로 경험적 항생제를 투여받은 성인에서, 후향적으로 볼 때 실제 세균 감염일 가능성은 얼마나 되며, 이 가능성이 면역저하 환자와 비면역저하 환자 사이에서 어떻게 다른가?

pico.population: [USA] Adults treated for possible sepsis (blood culture draw, lactate measurement, and IV antibiotic administration) within 6 hours of emergency department (ED) arrival at nine hospitals between 2022 and 2024; 350 hospitalizations were randomly selected for structured medical record review, oversampling for immunocompromised status using administrative codes. Of 350 patients, 186 (53.1%) were confirmed as immunocompromised and 164 (46.9%) as nonimmunocompromised.
pico.intervention: Confirmed immunocompromised status per Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) criteria (immunocompromised patients, n=186 [53.1%]), determined by structured medical record review.
pico.comparison: Nonimmunocompromised patients (n=164 [46.9%]) treated empirically for possible sepsis over the same period.
pico.outcome: Definite or probable bacterial infection (determined by post hoc structured review) was identified in 92 of 186 (49.5%) immunocompromised patients vs. 97 of 164 (59.1%) nonimmunocompromised patients (p = 0.07).

pico_ko.population: [미국] 9개 병원에서 2022~2024년 사이 응급실(ED) 도착 6시간 이내에 패혈증 의심으로 치료받은(혈액배양 채취, 젖산 측정, IV 항생제 투여) 성인; 행정 코드를 이용해 면역저하 상태를 oversampling하여 350건의 입원을 무작위 선정해 구조화된 의무기록 검토를 시행함. 350명 중 186명(53.1%)이 면역저하로, 164명(46.9%)이 비면역저하로 확인됨.
pico_ko.intervention: 구조화된 의무기록 검토를 통해 Centers for Disease Control and Prevention(CDC) 기준으로 확인된 면역저하 상태(면역저하 환자, n=186 [53.1%]).
pico_ko.comparison: 같은 기간 동안 패혈증 의심으로 경험적 치료를 받은 비면역저하 환자(n=164 [46.9%]).
pico_ko.outcome: 후향적 구조화 검토로 판정한 확정적(definite) 또는 유력한(probable) 세균 감염은 면역저하 환자 186명 중 92명(49.5%) vs. 비면역저하 환자 164명 중 97명(59.1%)에서 확인됨 (p = 0.07).

keyFindings: Only 92 of 186 (49.5%) immunocompromised patients treated empirically for possible sepsis had definite or probable bacterial infection in retrospect, vs. 97 of 164 (59.1%) nonimmunocompromised patients (p = 0.07).
Immunocompromised patients more commonly presented with fevers, chills or rigors (66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001) and ED clinicians more often documented concern for sepsis (74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).

Non-bacterial mimics differed by host: viral/fungal infection, febrile neutropenia without bacterial evidence, malignancy progression, and medication toxicity predominated in immunocompromised patients, whereas chronic heart/lung disease exacerbations, hypovolemia, and hypervolemia predominated in nonimmunocompromised patients.
keyFindings_ko: 패혈증 의심으로 경험적 치료를 받은 면역저하 환자 186명 중 92명(49.5%)만이 후향적으로 확정적/유력한 세균 감염이었고, 비면역저하 환자는 164명 중 97명(59.1%)이었음 (p = 0.07).
면역저하 환자는 발열, 오한 또는 전율(rigors)을 더 흔히 보였고(66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001), ED 임상의가 패혈증 우려를 더 자주 기록함(74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).
비세균성 유사질환은 숙주에 따라 달랐음: 면역저하 환자에서는 viral/fungal 감염, 세균 증거 없는 febrile neutropenia, 악성종양 진행, 약물 독성이 우세했고, 비면역저하 환자에서는 만성 심장/폐질환 악화, hypovolemia, hypervolemia가 우세했음.

entries.title: Coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury: an invasive coronary physiology study.
entries.title_ko: 패혈증 및 심근손상 환자에서의 관상동맥 미세혈관 기능: 침습적 관상동맥 생리 연구
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 패혈증 및 심근손상 환자에서 관상동맥 미세혈관 기능장애(CMD)가 존재하는지, 그리고 침습적으로 측정한 미세혈관 기능장애 정도(IMR, MRR)가 cardiac troponin 상승 정도와 상관관계가 있는지를 규명한다.

pico.population: [Sweden] Consecutive adults (aged 40–85 years) admitted to intensive or intermediate care at Danderyd University Hospital with sepsis or septic shock (Sepsis-3 criteria) and myocardial injury (plasma hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L within 48 h of sepsis onset), prospectively enrolled June 2019–December 2024; 55 patients underwent coronary angiography and 49 completed invasive coronary microvascular assessment.
pico.intervention: Invasive thermodilution-based assessment of coronary microvascular function (via a pressure/thermistor wire in the LAD, with IV adenosine 167 µg/kg/min hyperaemia), yielding IMR and microvascular resistance reserve (MRR); CMD was defined as IMR > 25 and/or MRR ≤ 3. The primary exposure was plasma hs-cTnT concentration (highest value in first 48 h).
pico.comparison: Age-, sex-, and obstructive-CAD-lesion–matched patients with chronic coronary syndrome (CCS) selected from a cohort of 506 patients who underwent clinically indicated elective coronary angiography.
pico.outcome: The primary outcome, the association between hs-cTnT and IMR assessed by restricted cubic spline analysis, showed no evidence of an association (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687).

pico_ko.population: [스웨덴] Danderyd University Hospital의 중환자실 또는 준중환자실에 입원한 40–85세 성인으로, 패혈증 또는 septic shock(Sepsis-3 기준)이며 심근손상(패혈증 발병 48시간 이내 plasma hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L)이 있는 연속 환자. 2019년 6월–2024년 12월에 전향적으로 등록; 55명이 관상동맥조영술을 받았고 49명이 침습적 관상동맥 미세혈관 평가를 완료함.
pico_ko.intervention: 침습적 thermodilution 기반 관상동맥 미세혈관 기능 평가(LAD에 pressure/thermistor wire 삽입, IV adenosine 167 µg/kg/min으로 최대 충혈 유도)로 IMR과 microvascular resistance reserve(MRR)를 측정. CMD는 IMR > 25 및/또는 MRR ≤ 3으로 정의. 주요 노출변수는 plasma hs-cTnT 농도(첫 48시간 내 최고값).
pico_ko.comparison: 나이·성별·폐색성 CAD 병변 수로 매칭한 chronic coronary syndrome(CCS) 환자(선택적 관상동맥조영술을 받은 506명 코호트에서 선정).
pico_ko.outcome: 주요 결과인 hs-cTnT와 IMR 간 연관성은 restricted cubic spline 분석에서 연관성의 근거가 없었다(overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687).

keyFindings: CMD was common (30/49, 61%) and heterogeneous, with distinct physiological phenotypes: elevated IMR only 8/49 (16%), functional CMD (MRR ≤ 3, IMR ≤ 25) 9/49 (18%), and structural CMD (MRR ≤ 3, IMR > 25) 13/49 (27%).
Neither IMR (overall P = 0.899) nor MRR (overall P = 0.987) was associated with hs-cTnT concentration, indicating coronary microvascular indices did not explain the magnitude of troponin release.

Previously unrecognised obstructive CAD was found in 12/55 (22%), and sepsis patients had reduced microvascular vasodilatory capacity vs matched CCS controls (MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs 4.0 [2.7–6.2]) with similar IMR.
keyFindings_ko: CMD는 흔했고(30/49, 61%) 이질적이었으며, 뚜렷한 생리학적 표현형을 보였다: elevated IMR only 8/49(16%), functional CMD(MRR ≤ 3, IMR ≤ 25) 9/49(18%), structural CMD(MRR ≤ 3, IMR > 25) 13/49(27%).
IMR(overall P = 0.899)도 MRR(overall P = 0.987)도 hs-cTnT 농도와 연관성이 없었으며, 이는 관상동맥 미세혈관 지표가 troponin 상승 정도를 설명하지 못함을 시사한다.
이전에 인지되지 않았던 폐색성 CAD가 55명 중 12명(22%)에서 발견되었고, 패혈증 환자는 매칭된 CCS 대조군 대비 미세혈관 확장능이 감소했으나(MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs 4.0 [2.7–6.2]) IMR은 유사했다.
entries.fullText:
### Background
Myocardial injury is common in sepsis and consistently associated with adverse outcomes, yet its underlying mechanisms remain incompletely understood [, ]. Coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMD) has been proposed as a contributing mechanism []. Histopathological studies demonstrate microvascular alterations alongside cardiomyocyte damage, supporting a mechanistic link between coronary microvascular injury and myocardial injury [, ]. However, CMD has not been systematically characterised in vivo in patients with sepsis.
The contribution of obstructive coronary artery disease (CAD) to myocardial injury in sepsis also remains uncertain. Existing angiographic studies have largely been restricted to highly selected patients with suspected acute coronary syndromes, and the frequency of obstructive CAD in patients with sepsis-associated myocardial injury remains poorly defined [–].
Sepsis is fundamentally a disorder of the microcirculation, characterised by widespread endothelial and glycocalyx injury, capillary leak, and impaired microvascular perfusion, leading to multi-organ dysfunction, often with cardiac involvement [, ]. These alterations may manifest within the coronary circulation as acute CMD through impaired vasoreactivity, microvascular obstruction, and interstitial oedema, potentially contributing to myocardial injury [, ].
In this study, we performed invasive coronary angiography and assessment of coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury, defined by elevated plasma high-sensitivity cardiac troponin T (hs-cTnT) concentrations. We hypothesised that greater impairment in microvascular function would be associated with higher hs-cTnT concentrations. In addition, we characterised the frequency and physiological phenotypes of CMD in sepsis and evaluated the occurrence of underlying obstructive epicardial CAD. We also explored associations between coronary physiological indices, echocardiographic findings, and cardiac biomarker concentrations.
Coronary microvascular function was quantified using established invasive thermodilution-derived indices, including the index of microcirculatory resistance (IMR) and microvascular resistance reserve (MRR) [, ]. We also compared microvascular findings with those of a matched cohort of patients with chronic coronary syndrome (CCS) to provide physiological context for the magnitude and patterns of CMD observed in sepsis.

### Methods

### Study design and objectives
This prospective observational study aimed to characterise coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis-associated myocardial injury using invasive thermodilution-based assessment. The primary objective was to examine the association between plasma hs-cTnT concentrations and IMR, an invasive index of hyperaemic coronary microvascular resistance.
Pre-specified secondary objectives were to evaluate the association between plasma hs-cTnT concentrations and obstructive coronary artery disease (CAD), additional thermodilution-derived coronary microvascular indices, and echocardiographic measures of cardiac structure and function. Additional secondary objectives were to characterise the occurrence and physiological phenotypes of CMD.
Exploratory objectives included assessing associations of plasma NT-proBNP concentrations with coronary microvascular indices and echocardiographic measures of cardiac structure and function. Coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis was also compared with that of a matched control cohort with CCS.

### Patient population
In the  (COMTESS; ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: ; registered March 2, 2024), we prospectively enrolled consecutive adults admitted to the intensive or intermediate care unit at Danderyd University Hospital. All patients with sepsis admitted to these units were prospectively screened for eligibility.
Eligible patients were aged 40–85 years, met the Sepsis-3 diagnostic criteria for sepsis or septic shock, had an expected survival >1 year, and demonstrated myocardial injury, defined as a plasma hs-cTnT concentration ≥ 15 ng/L within 48 h of sepsis onset [, ]. Patients were screened on the basis of hs-cTnT elevation irrespective of symptoms suggestive of acute coronary syndrome or prior suspicion of CAD.
Exclusion criteria included prior coronary artery bypass grafting, pre-admission left ventricular (LV) ejection fraction ≤ 39%, chronic kidney disease with a pre-admission estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) < 30 mL/min/1.73 m², and infective endocarditis. Patients with persistent clinical instability beyond day 8 (ongoing circulatory shock requiring vasopressors or respiratory failure requiring ventilatory support) were excluded. Patients were also excluded when invasive coronary angiography was considered unsafe or unfeasible (full criteria are provided in the Supplementary Methods). Detailed patient screening, enrolment, and reasons for exclusion are shown in Supplementary Figure S1.
Patients underwent coronary angiography with invasive assessment of coronary microvascular function and transthoracic echocardiography (TTE) following clinical stabilisation, between days 2 and 10 after sepsis onset. Invasive assessment was performed after haemodynamic stabilisation to minimise the influence of shock and vasoactive therapy on coronary physiological measurements and to ensure procedural safety.
The study was approved by the Swedish Ethical Review Authority, conducted in accordance with the Declaration of Helsinki, and all participants provided written informed consent.

### Coronary angiography and coronary microvascular assessment
Coronary angiography was performed according to standard clinical protocols. Obstructive CAD was defined as ≥ 50% diameter stenosis or fractional flow reserve (FFR) ≤ 0.80 in an epicardial coronary artery ≥ 2.5 mm in diameter [].
Coronary flow indices were obtained by thermodilution [, , ]. Following administration of ≥ 100 µg intracoronary nitroglycerine, a thermistor-equipped pressure wire (PressureWire™ X, Abbott Vascular Inc., CA, USA) was advanced > 70 mm into the left anterior descending artery (LAD) and connected to dedicated acquisition software (Coroventis Research AB, Uppsala, Sweden).
At rest, three intracoronary bolus injections of saline (3 mL each) were administered to determine mean transit time. Aortic and distal coronary pressures were simultaneously recorded. Maximal hyperaemia was induced using intravenous adenosine (167 µg/kg/min), followed by repeat triplicate saline injections to obtain hyperaemic mean transit time. Hyperaemic aortic and distal coronary pressures were simultaneously recorded [, ].
Resting and hyperaemic coronary blood flow (CBF) were defined as the inverse of mean transit time []. Baseline resistance index (BRI) and index of microcirculatory resistance (IMR) were calculated as measures of resting and hyperaemic microvascular resistance, respectively. Collateral-corrected IMR was used for all analyses to account for flow-limiting CAD [, ]. Microvascular resistance reserve (MRR) was calculated as a pressure-corrected index of coronary microvascular vasodilatory capacity. Unlike coronary flow reserve (CFR), which is influenced by both epicardial and microvascular disease, MRR is a specific index of microvascular vasodilator capacity [, ]. Detailed definitions and calculation formulas are provided in Supplementary Table S1.
CMD was defined as MRR ≤ 3 and/or IMR > 25 according to established invasive coronary physiology thresholds [, ]. Patients were further classified into four physiological phenotypes: no CMD (MRR > 3 and IMR ≤ 25); elevated IMR only (MRR > 3 and IMR > 25); functional CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR ≤ 25); and structural CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR > 25) [, , , ].

### Echocardiography
TTE was performed using Vivid E9 or Vivid E95 ultrasound systems (GE Healthcare) equipped with an M5Sc transducer and analysed according to established guidelines []. Comprehensive echocardiographic assessment of cardiac structure and function was performed by certified sonographers or clinical physiologists and reviewed by a single certified assessor blinded to clinical data.
Detailed echocardiographic acquisition, measurements, thresholds, and classification criteria for diastolic dysfunction are provided in the Supplementary Methods.

### Cardiac biomarkers
Plasma hs-cTnT (Roche Diagnostics, Elecsys Assay 2) and N-terminal pro–B-type natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP; Roche Diagnostics, Elecsys Assay 3) were measured serially during the first 48 h after sepsis onset. Sampling was intended at approximately 12, 24, and 48 h according to the study protocol. In practice, timing was guided by local routine and clinical indication, and additional samples were often obtained at shorter intervals (1–3 h) to assess dynamic changes. hs-cTnT measurements were repeated until concentrations stabilised or declined, and the highest value recorded during the first 48 h was used to estimate early myocardial injury burden.

### Clinical data collection
Baseline demographics, comorbidities identified from International Classification of Diseases, Tenth Revision (ICD-10) codes recorded prior to admission, in-hospital laboratory results and treatments, primary site of infection, microbiological findings, and vital status were prospectively collected from the electronic health record. Sepsis onset was defined as the earliest documented time at which sepsis-related physiological abnormalities included in the National Early Warning Score 2 were recorded in the electronic health record. A 12-lead electrocardiogram was obtained within four hours of sepsis onset. Atrial fibrillation was confirmed by findings on electrocardiography or continuous telemetry monitoring.

### Control population
Controls matched for age, sex and number of obstructive CAD lesions were selected from a cohort of 506 patients with CCS who underwent clinically indicated elective coronary angiography

entries.title: Mortality effect of albumin fluid resuscitation in adults with septic shock: a systematic review and dual frequentist-bayesian meta-analysis of randomised trials.
entries.title_ko: 성인 패혈성 쇼크에서 알부민 수액 소생술의 사망률 효과: 무작위 배정 시험에 대한 체계적 문헌고찰 및 frequentist-Bayesian 이중 메타분석
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 성인 패혈성 쇼크 환자에서 알부민 기반 수액 소생술은 crystalloid 기반 소생술에 비해 전체 원인 사망률(all-cause mortality)을 감소시키는가?

pico.population: [International] Adults with septic shock; seven RCTs (n = 3273) were included. Three trials primarily recruited septic shock patients, while data from the remaining were derived from subgroups or extracted strata.
pico.intervention: Albumin-based resuscitation strategies (as compared across albumin formulation, dosing strategy, and trial-level baseline serum albumin subgroups).
pico.outcome: Primary outcome was all-cause mortality at the longest available follow-up (up to 90 days): albumin-based fluid resuscitation was associated with a statistically significant 10% reduction in the relative risk of all-cause mortality (RR 0.90, 95% CI 0.83-0.99; p = 0.02; I² = 0%). Bayesian analysis under the primary weakly informative prior yielded a posterior probability of mortality reduction of 94.7% (P[RR < 1.0]).

pico_ko.population: [다국가] 성인 패혈성 쇼크 환자; 7개 RCT(n = 3273)가 포함됨. 3개 시험은 주로 패혈성 쇼크 환자를 모집하였고, 나머지 데이터는 subgroup 또는 추출된 strata에서 도출되었다.
pico_ko.intervention: 알부민 기반 소생술 전략(albumin formulation, dosing strategy, 시험 수준의 baseline serum albumin subgroup에 걸쳐 비교됨).
pico_ko.outcome: 1차 결과는 가장 긴 추적 시점(최대 90일)의 all-cause mortality: 알부민 기반 수액 소생술은 all-cause mortality의 relative risk를 통계적으로 유의하게 10% 감소시켰다(RR 0.90, 95% CI 0.83-0.99; p = 0.02; I² = 0%). primary weakly informative prior 하의 Bayesian 분석에서 사망률 감소의 posterior probability는 94.7%였다(P[RR < 1.0]).

keyFindings: Across 7 RCTs (n = 3273), albumin-based fluid resuscitation was associated with a statistically significant 10% reduction in relative risk of all-cause mortality at longest follow-up (RR 0.90, 95% CI 0.83-0.99; p = 0.02) with no heterogeneity (I² = 0%).
Bayesian analysis under the primary weakly informative prior gave a posterior probability of mortality reduction of 94.7% (P[RR < 1.0]), directionally concordant with the frequentist estimate.

Pre-specified subgroup analyses by albumin formulation, dosing strategy, and trial-level baseline serum albumin showed no evidence of effect modification; overall GRADE certainty was low because evidence was indirect and imprecise.
keyFindings_ko: 7개 RCT(n = 3273)에서 알부민 기반 수액 소생술은 가장 긴 추적 시점의 all-cause mortality relative risk를 통계적으로 유의하게 10% 감소시켰으며(RR 0.90, 95% CI 0.83-0.99; p = 0.02) 이질성은 없었다(I² = 0%).
primary weakly informative prior 하의 Bayesian 분석에서 사망률 감소의 posterior probability는 94.7%로(P[RR < 1.0]) frequentist 추정치와 방향이 일치했다.
albumin formulation, dosing strategy, 시험 수준 baseline serum albumin에 따른 사전 지정 subgroup 분석에서 effect modification의 근거는 없었으며, 근거가 간접적이고 부정확하여 전반적 GRADE 확실성은 low였다.

entries.title: The usual suspects: a pragmatic framework to identify and address reversible contributors in apparent refractory septic shock.
entries.title_ko: 흔한 용의자들: 겉보기 불응성 패혈성 쇼크에서 가역적 기여 요인을 식별하고 다루기 위한 실용적 프레임워크
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 초기 소생술에도 불구하고 지속적 저관류 상태이거나 승압제 증량이 필요한 겉보기 불응성 패혈성 쇼크 환자에서, 쇼크가 진정한 불응성이라고 결론짓기 전에 임상의가 가역적 기여 요인을 체계적으로 재평가하고 다룰 수 있는 방법은 무엇인가?

pico.population: [Country NR] Adult patients with septic shock, specifically a subset who remain hypoperfused or require escalating vasopressor support despite initial resuscitation — an "apparent refractory" trajectory in which early high vasopressor requirements or persistent hypoperfusion may still reflect potentially modifiable contributors.
pico.intervention: A pragmatic, hypothesis-driven bedside framework (the "usual suspects") for structured, parallel reassessment of potentially reversible contributors: antimicrobial adequacy and source control as the foundational substrate; fluid responsiveness, tolerance, and efficiency; endocrine, metabolic, and iatrogenic contributors to vasoplegia (e.g., acidemia, sedation burden); and cardiac mechanisms including ventricular performance, ventriculo-arterial coupling, and dynamic left ventricular outflow tract obstruction — reassessment guided by the dominant physiology rather than a fixed sequence.
pico.outcome: As a Perspective/framework article, no quantitative outcome is measured or reported. The proposed benefit is conceptual: to operationalize the "optimization" dimension of refractoriness and help clinicians interpret persistent hypoperfusion and vasopressor escalation during the transition from apparent to established refractory septic shock, serving as an operational companion to current SCCM/ESICM consensus definitions.

pico_ko.population: [국가 미기재] 패혈성 쇼크 성인 환자, 특히 초기 소생술에도 불구하고 지속적 저관류 상태이거나 승압제 증량이 필요한 하위군 — 초기 높은 승압제 요구량이나 지속적 저관류가 여전히 교정 가능한 기여 요인을 반영할 수 있는 '겉보기 불응성' 경과.
pico_ko.intervention: 가역적 기여 요인을 구조적·병렬적으로 재평가하기 위한 실용적·가설 기반 침상 프레임워크('흔한 용의자들'): 근본 기반으로서 항균제 적절성 및 source control; fluid responsiveness·tolerance·efficiency; vasoplegia에 대한 내분비·대사·의인성 기여 요인(예: acidemia, sedation burden); 그리고 ventricular performance, ventriculo-arterial coupling, 동적 left ventricular outflow tract obstruction을 포함한 심장 기전 — 고정된 순서가 아니라 지배적 생리에 따라 재평가.
pico_ko.outcome: Perspective/프레임워크 논문으로서 정량적 결과는 측정되거나 보고되지 않음. 제안된 이점은 개념적임: 불응성의 'optimization' 차원을 조작화하고, 겉보기 불응성에서 확립된 불응성 패혈성 쇼크로의 이행기에 지속적 저관류와 승압제 증량을 임상의가 해석하도록 도우며, 현행 SCCM/ESICM 합의 정의의 실무적 동반 도구 역할을 함.

keyFindings: A subset of septic shock patients who remain hypoperfused or need escalating vasopressors after initial resuscitation may not be truly refractory — early high vasopressor needs or persistent hypoperfusion can still reflect modifiable contributors (unresolved infection, inadequate fluids, metabolic derangements, iatrogenic factors, cardiac dysfunction).

The paper proposes the 'usual suspects' — a parallel, hypothesis-driven bedside reassessment across foundational (antimicrobial adequacy, source control), fluid, endocrine/metabolic/iatrogenic (vasoplegia; acidemia, sedation), and cardiac (ventricular performance, ventriculo-arterial coupling, dynamic LVOT obstruction) domains.

Refractoriness is framed as a multidimensional construct shaped by severity, time in shock, and prior optimization; the relative contribution of each domain varies across patients and over time, so reassessment should be guided by the dominant physiology rather than a fixed sequence.
keyFindings_ko: 초기 소생술 후에도 지속적 저관류이거나 승압제 증량이 필요한 패혈성 쇼크 하위군이 반드시 진정한 불응성은 아닐 수 있음 — 초기 높은 승압제 요구량이나 지속적 저관류는 여전히 교정 가능한 요인(미해결 감염, 불충분한 수액, 대사 이상, 의인성 요인, 심기능 저하)을 반영할 수 있음.

본 논문은 '흔한 용의자들'을 제안함 — 기반(항균제 적절성, source control), fluid, 내분비/대사/의인성(vasoplegia; acidemia, sedation), 심장(ventricular performance, ventriculo-arterial coupling, 동적 LVOT obstruction) 영역에 걸친 병렬적·가설 기반 침상 재평가.
불응성은 severity, time in shock, prior optimization으로 형성되는 다차원적 구성 개념으로 제시됨; 각 영역의 상대적 기여도가 환자별·시간별로 달라지므로 고정된 순서가 아니라 지배적 생리에 따라 재평가해야 함.

entries.title: Sepsis-induced neuromuscular dysfunction: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
entries.title_ko: 패혈증 유발 신경근 기능장애: 메타분석을 동반한 체계적 문헌고찰
entries.journal: Journal of infection and public health
entries.clinicalQuestion_ko: 패혈증 성인 환자에서 sepsis-induced neuromuscular dysfunction(SIND)과 연관된 위험인자는 무엇이며, 임상 연구들에서의 통합(pooled) 유병률은 어느 정도인가?

pico.population: [International] Fourteen studies including 596 adult patients with sepsis; a systematic review and meta-analysis conducted per PRISMA 2020 and registered in PROSPERO (CRD42024577234), searching Medline, BMC, Cochrane Library, and Google Scholar.
pico.intervention: Not an interventional study; exposure of interest was 40 clinical parameters (risk factors) grouped into seven categories — baseline characteristics, organ failure, disease severity indices, medical procedures, plasma biomarkers, pharmacological therapy, and length of stay — further stratified as modifiable or non-modifiable.
pico.outcome: Pooled prevalence of SIND was 60% (95% CI: 50-70%), with substantial heterogeneity. ICU-acquired neuromuscular dysfunction showed a prevalence of 70% (95% CI: 60-80%), whereas direct neuromuscular damage attributable to sepsis was lower (9%, 95% CI: 4-19%).

pico_ko.population: [다국가] 패혈증 성인 환자 596명을 포함한 14개 연구; PRISMA 2020에 따라 수행되고 PROSPERO(CRD42024577234)에 등록된 체계적 문헌고찰 및 메타분석으로, Medline, BMC, Cochrane Library, Google Scholar를 검색함.
pico_ko.intervention: 중재 연구가 아니며, 관심 노출은 7개 범주(baseline characteristics, organ failure, disease severity indices, medical procedures, plasma biomarkers, pharmacological therapy, length of stay)로 묶인 40개 임상 지표(위험인자)로, 다시 modifiable/non-modifiable로 층화됨.
pico_ko.outcome: SIND의 통합 유병률은 60%(95% CI: 50-70%)이며 이질성이 상당함. ICU-acquired neuromuscular dysfunction 유병률은 70%(95% CI: 60-80%)였고, 패혈증에 직접 기인한 신경근 손상은 더 낮은 9%(95% CI: 4-19%)였음.

keyFindings: Pooled prevalence of SIND was 60% (95% CI: 50-70%) across 14 studies and 596 adult septic patients, with substantial heterogeneity.
ICU-acquired neuromuscular dysfunction was highly prevalent at 70% (95% CI: 60-80%), while neuromuscular damage directly attributable to sepsis was much lower at 9% (95% CI: 4-19%).

40 clinical parameters were grouped into seven domains (baseline characteristics, organ failure, disease severity indices, medical procedures, plasma biomarkers, pharmacological therapy, length of stay); critical illness polyneuropathy was the most frequently reported entity.
keyFindings_ko: 14개 연구·성인 패혈증 환자 596명에서 SIND의 통합 유병률은 60%(95% CI: 50-70%)였으며 이질성이 상당함.
ICU-acquired neuromuscular dysfunction은 70%(95% CI: 60-80%)로 매우 흔했던 반면, 패혈증에 직접 기인한 신경근 손상은 9%(95% CI: 4-19%)로 훨씬 낮았음.

40개 임상 지표가 7개 도메인(baseline characteristics, organ failure, disease severity indices, medical procedures, plasma biomarkers, pharmacological therapy, length of stay)으로 분류되었고, critical illness polyneuropathy가 가장 흔히 보고된 병태였음.
